  "text": "The Apache Beam pipeline runner translation layer is implemented across multiple Java packages, primarily located in sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk (for the core SDK) and runners directories (for runner-specific implementations).\n\n## Core Translation Infrastructure\n\n**PipelineTranslation System**: The `PipelineTranslation` class (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/PipelineTranslation.java) is the central class that converts Beam Pipeline objects to/from Runner API protocol buffers. It works with `SdkComponents` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/SdkComponents.java) which manages the registration and lookup of coders, windowing strategies, and other SDK components.\n\n**TransformHierarchy Walker**: The `TransformHierarchy` class (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/TransformHierarchy.java) represents the hierarchical structure of transforms in a pipeline. The TransformHierarchy.Node inner class walks the pipeline tree, allowing traversal and manipulation of the transform graph.\n\n**PTransformOverride Mechanism**: The override mechanism is implemented through:\n- `PTransformOverride` interface (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverride.java) - defines how to detect and replace transforms\n- `PTransformOverrideFactory` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverrideFactory.java) - factory interface for creating overrides\n- Concrete implementations like `SingleInputOutputOverrideFactory`, `SplittableParDo`, and `DeduplicatedFlattenFactory` provide specific transform replacements\n- Support utilities: `PTransformMatchers` (matches transform patterns), `PTransformReplacements` (handles replacement logic), `ReplacementOutputs` (maps output connections)\n\n**ExecutableStagePayload Construction**: The `ExecutableStageTranslation` class (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/ExecutableStageTranslation.java) manages conversion of ExecutableStages to/from proto payloads. The `ExecutableStage` interface (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ExecutableStage.java) and its implementation `ImmutableExecutableStage` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ImmutableExecutableStage.java) represent executable units. Supporting reference classes like `SideInputReference`, `TimerReference`, and `UserStateReference` represent the components within ExecutableStagePayload.\n\n**BoundedSource/UnboundedSource Adapters**: \n- Base classes: `BoundedSource` and `UnboundedSource` (in sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/io/)\n- Adapter implementations: `UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource.java) converts BoundedSource to UnboundedSource\n- `BoundedReadFromUnboundedSource` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/io/BoundedReadFromUnboundedSource.java) does the reverse\n- `ReadTranslation` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/ReadTranslation.java) handles translation of Read transforms to/from proto format, managing both bounded and unbounded sources\n\n## Transform-Specific Translators\n\nThe system includes specific translator classes for major transforms:\n- `ParDoTranslation` for ParDo transforms\n- `CombineTranslation` for Combine operations\n- `GroupByKeyTranslation` for GroupByKey operations\n- `FlattenTranslator` for Flatten operations\n- Coder translators: `CoderTranslator`, `CoderTranslators`, and `CoderTranslation`\n\n## Graph Analysis and Fusion\n\nFor runner optimization, the system includes:\n- `QueryablePipeline` for graph traversal and querying\n- `GreedyPipelineFuser` and `GreedyStageFuser` for stage fusion\n- `PipelineValidator` for validating ExecutableStagePayload content\n- Graph optimization via `ProtoOverrides` for proto-based transform overrides\n\n## FnExecution Runner Support\n\nThe runners/java-fn-execution/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/runners/fnexecution/translation/ package contains:\n- `PipelineTranslatorUtils` for shared translation utilities\n- `BatchSideInputHandlerFactory` and `StreamingSideInputHandlerFactory` for managing side inputs during execution\n\nThis architecture enables the flexible translation of high-level Beam pipelines into runner-specific execution primitives while maintaining abstraction boundaries and supporting multiple execution models."
}

  "text": "The Apache Beam pipeline runner translation layer is implemented across multiple Java packages, primarily located in sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk (for the core SDK) and runners directories (for runner-specific implementations).\n\n## Core Translation Infrastructure\n\n**PipelineTranslation System**: The `PipelineTranslation` class (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/PipelineTranslation.java) is the central class that converts Beam Pipeline objects to/from Runner API protocol buffers. It works with `SdkComponents` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/SdkComponents.java) which manages the registration and lookup of coders, windowing strategies, and other SDK components.\n\n**TransformHierarchy Walker**: The `TransformHierarchy` class (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/TransformHierarchy.java) represents the hierarchical structure of transforms in a pipeline. The TransformHierarchy.Node inner class walks the pipeline tree, allowing traversal and manipulation of the transform graph.\n\n**PTransformOverride Mechanism**: The override mechanism is implemented through:\n- `PTransformOverride` interface (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverride.java) - defines how to detect and replace transforms\n- `PTransformOverrideFactory` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverrideFactory.java) - factory interface for creating overrides\n- Concrete implementations like `SingleInputOutputOverrideFactory`, `SplittableParDo`, and `DeduplicatedFlattenFactory` provide specific transform replacements\n- Support utilities: `PTransformMatchers` (matches transform patterns), `PTransformReplacements` (handles replacement logic), `ReplacementOutputs` (maps output connections)\n\n**ExecutableStagePayload Construction**: The `ExecutableStageTranslation` class (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/ExecutableStageTranslation.java) manages conversion of ExecutableStages to/from proto payloads. The `ExecutableStage` interface (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ExecutableStage.java) and its implementation `ImmutableExecutableStage` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ImmutableExecutableStage.java) represent executable units. Supporting reference classes like `SideInputReference`, `TimerReference`, and `UserStateReference` represent the components within ExecutableStagePayload.\n\n**BoundedSource/UnboundedSource Adapters**: \n- Base classes: `BoundedSource` and `UnboundedSource` (in sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/io/)\n- Adapter implementations: `UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource.java) converts BoundedSource to UnboundedSource\n- `BoundedReadFromUnboundedSource` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/io/BoundedReadFromUnboundedSource.java) does the reverse\n- `ReadTranslation` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/ReadTranslation.java) handles translation of Read transforms to/from proto format, managing both bounded and unbounded sources\n\n## Transform-Specific Translators\n\nThe system includes specific translator classes for major transforms:\n- `ParDoTranslation` for ParDo transforms\n- `CombineTranslation` for Combine operations\n- `GroupByKeyTranslation` for GroupByKey operations\n- `FlattenTranslator` for Flatten operations\n- Coder translators: `CoderTranslator`, `CoderTranslators`, and `CoderTranslation`\n\n## Graph Analysis and Fusion\n\nFor runner optimization, the system includes:\n- `QueryablePipeline` for graph traversal and querying\n- `GreedyPipelineFuser` and `GreedyStageFuser` for stage fusion\n- `PipelineValidator` for validating ExecutableStagePayload content\n- Graph optimization via `ProtoOverrides` for proto-based transform overrides\n\n## FnExecution Runner Support\n\nThe runners/java-fn-execution/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/runners/fnexecution/translation/ package contains:\n- `PipelineTranslatorUtils` for shared translation utilities\n- `BatchSideInputHandlerFactory` and `StreamingSideInputHandlerFactory` for managing side inputs during execution\n\nThis architecture enables the flexible translation of high-level Beam pipelines into runner-specific execution primitives while maintaining abstraction boundaries and supporting multiple execution models."
}

  "text": "The Apache Beam pipeline runner translation layer is implemented across multiple Java packages, primarily located in sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk (for the core SDK) and runners directories (for runner-specific implementations).\n\n## Core Translation Infrastructure\n\n**PipelineTranslation System**: The `PipelineTranslation` class (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/PipelineTranslation.java) is the central class that converts Beam Pipeline objects to/from Runner API protocol buffers. It works with `SdkComponents` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/SdkComponents.java) which manages the registration and lookup of coders, windowing strategies, and other SDK components.\n\n**TransformHierarchy Walker**: The `TransformHierarchy` class (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/TransformHierarchy.java) represents the hierarchical structure of transforms in a pipeline. The TransformHierarchy.Node inner class walks the pipeline tree, allowing traversal and manipulation of the transform graph.\n\n**PTransformOverride Mechanism**: The override mechanism is implemented through:\n- `PTransformOverride` interface (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverride.java) - defines how to detect and replace transforms\n- `PTransformOverrideFactory` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverrideFactory.java) - factory interface for creating overrides\n- Concrete implementations like `SingleInputOutputOverrideFactory`, `SplittableParDo`, and `DeduplicatedFlattenFactory` provide specific transform replacements\n- Support utilities: `PTransformMatchers` (matches transform patterns), `PTransformReplacements` (handles replacement logic), `ReplacementOutputs` (maps output connections)\n\n**ExecutableStagePayload Construction**: The `ExecutableStageTranslation` class (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/ExecutableStageTranslation.java) manages conversion of ExecutableStages to/from proto payloads. The `ExecutableStage` interface (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ExecutableStage.java) and its implementation `ImmutableExecutableStage` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ImmutableExecutableStage.java) represent executable units. Supporting reference classes like `SideInputReference`, `TimerReference`, and `UserStateReference` represent the components within ExecutableStagePayload.\n\n**BoundedSource/UnboundedSource Adapters**: \n- Base classes: `BoundedSource` and `UnboundedSource` (in sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/io/)\n- Adapter implementations: `UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource.java) converts BoundedSource to UnboundedSource\n- `BoundedReadFromUnboundedSource` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/io/BoundedReadFromUnboundedSource.java) does the reverse\n- `ReadTranslation` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/ReadTranslation.java) handles translation of Read transforms to/from proto format, managing both bounded and unbounded sources\n\n## Transform-Specific Translators\n\nThe system includes specific translator classes for major transforms:\n- `ParDoTranslation` for ParDo transforms\n- `CombineTranslation` for Combine operations\n- `GroupByKeyTranslation` for GroupByKey operations\n- `FlattenTranslator` for Flatten operations\n- Coder translators: `CoderTranslator`, `CoderTranslators`, and `CoderTranslation`\n\n## Graph Analysis and Fusion\n\nFor runner optimization, the system includes:\n- `QueryablePipeline` for graph traversal and querying\n- `GreedyPipelineFuser` and `GreedyStageFuser` for stage fusion\n- `PipelineValidator` for validating ExecutableStagePayload content\n- Graph optimization via `ProtoOverrides` for proto-based transform overrides\n\n## FnExecution Runner Support\n\nThe runners/java-fn-execution/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/runners/fnexecution/translation/ package contains:\n- `PipelineTranslatorUtils` for shared translation utilities\n- `BatchSideInputHandlerFactory` and `StreamingSideInputHandlerFactory` for managing side inputs during execution\n\nThis architecture enables the flexible translation of high-level Beam pipelines into runner-specific execution primitives while maintaining abstraction boundaries and supporting multiple execution models."

It works with `SdkComponents` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/SdkComponents.java) which manages the registration and lookup of coders, windowing strategies, and other SDK components.\n\n**TransformHierarchy Walker**: The `TransformHierarchy` class (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/TransformHierarchy.java) represents the hierarchical structure of transforms in a pipeline. The TransformHierarchy.Node inner class walks the pipeline tree, allowing traversal and manipulation of the transform graph.\n\n**PTransformOverride Mechanism**: The override mechanism is implemented through:\n- `PTransformOverride` interface (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverride.java) - defines how to detect and replace transforms\n- `PTransformOverrideFactory` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverrideFactory.java) - factory interface for creating overrides\n- Concrete implementations like `SingleInputOutputOverrideFactory`, `SplittableParDo`, and `DeduplicatedFlattenFactory` provide specific transform replacements\n- Support utilities: `PTransformMatchers` (matches transform patterns), `PTransformReplacements` (handles replacement logic), `ReplacementOutputs` (maps output connections)\n\n**ExecutableStagePayload Construction**: The `ExecutableStageTranslation` class (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/ExecutableStageTranslation.java) manages conversion of ExecutableStages to/from proto payloads. The `ExecutableStage` interface (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ExecutableStage.java) and its implementation `ImmutableExecutableStage` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ImmutableExecutableStage.java) represent executable units. Supporting reference classes like `SideInputReference`, `TimerReference`, and `UserStateReference` represent the components within ExecutableStagePayload.\n\n**BoundedSource/UnboundedSource Adapters**: \n- Base classes: `BoundedSource` and `UnboundedSource` (in sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/io/)\n- Adapter implementations: `UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource` (sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource.java) converts BoundedSource to UnboundedSource\n- `BoundedReadFromUnboundedSource`
